title: Cash Controls in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger cash controls in practice judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cash Controls in Practice is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Cash Controls in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cash controls in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cash Controls in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
